
MCMC Diagnostics {data-navmenu="Diagnostics"}
=====================================

Row {.tabset}
-------------------------------------

### MCMC Summary

```{r mcmc_summary}
diag <- mv$mcmc_diagnostics
chr_or_unk <- function(x)
  if (!is.null(x)) as.character(x) else "Unknown"
rows <- list(
  data.frame(
    Property = "Iterations per chain",
    Value    = chr_or_unk(diag$n_iter),
    stringsAsFactors = FALSE),
  data.frame(
    Property = "Chains",
    Value    = chr_or_unk(diag$n_chains),
    stringsAsFactors = FALSE),
  data.frame(
    Property = "Divergent transitions",
    Value    = if (!is.null(diag$n_div) && !is.na(diag$n_div))
                 as.character(diag$n_div) else "Unknown",
    stringsAsFactors = FALSE),
  data.frame(
    Property = "Parameters sampled",
    Value    = if (!is.null(diag$parameters))
                 as.character(length(diag$parameters)) else "Unknown",
    stringsAsFactors = FALSE)
)
if (!is.null(diag$rhat)) {
  rh <- diag$rhat[is.finite(diag$rhat)]
  rows <- c(rows, list(
    data.frame(
      Property = "Max Rhat",
      Value    = sprintf("%.4f", max(rh, na.rm = TRUE)),
      stringsAsFactors = FALSE),
    data.frame(
      Property = "Rhat > 1.05",
      Value    = as.character(sum(rh > 1.05, na.rm = TRUE)),
      stringsAsFactors = FALSE)
  ))
}
if (!is.null(diag$ess)) {
  es <- diag$ess[is.finite(diag$ess)]
  rows <- c(rows, list(
    data.frame(
      Property = "Min ESS",
      Value    = sprintf("%.0f", min(es, na.rm = TRUE)),
      stringsAsFactors = FALSE),
    data.frame(
      Property = "Median ESS",
      Value    = sprintf("%.0f", stats::median(es, na.rm = TRUE)),
      stringsAsFactors = FALSE)
  ))
}
knitr::kable(
  x         = do.call(rbind, rows),
  caption   = "MCMC convergence summary",
  row.names = FALSE
)
```

### Rhat Distribution

```{r mcmc_rhat, eval=!is.null(mv$mcmc_diagnostics$rhat)}
rh <- mv$mcmc_diagnostics$rhat
rh <- rh[is.finite(rh)]
n_chains_diag <- if (!is.null(mv$mcmc_diagnostics$n_chains))
  mv$mcmc_diagnostics$n_chains else 1L
n_gt105 <- sum(rh > 1.05, na.rm = TRUE)
n_gt101 <- sum(rh > 1.01, na.rm = TRUE)

p <- plot_ly()
p <- add_histogram(
  p = p, x = rh,
  marker = list(color = "rgba(31,119,180,0.6)",
                line = list(color = "white", width = 0.5)),
  name = "Rhat", showlegend = FALSE,
  hovertemplate = "Rhat bin %{x:.3f}: %{y}<extra></extra>"
)
p <- add_trace(
  p = p, type = "scatter", mode = "lines",
  x = c(1.01, 1.01), y = c(0, length(rh) * 0.5),
  line = list(color = "#ff7f0e", width = 1.5, dash = "dash"),
  name = "1.01 threshold", showlegend = TRUE
)
p <- add_trace(
  p = p, type = "scatter", mode = "lines",
  x = c(1.05, 1.05), y = c(0, length(rh) * 0.5),
  line = list(color = "#d62728", width = 1.5, dash = "dash"),
  name = "1.05 threshold", showlegend = TRUE
)
lay <- modelVis::mv_layout()
lay$xaxis$title  <- "Rhat (Gelman-Rubin)"
lay$yaxis$title  <- "Count"
lay$showlegend   <- TRUE
lay$annotations  <- list(list(
  x = 0.98, y = 0.96, xref = "paper", yref = "paper",
  text = paste0(">1.01: ", n_gt101, "  >1.05: ", n_gt105),
  showarrow = FALSE, xanchor = "right",
  font = list(size = 11), bgcolor = "rgba(255,255,255,0.8)"
))
p <- do.call(layout, c(list(p = p), lay))
modelVis::mv_config(p = p)
```

### ESS Distribution

```{r mcmc_ess, results='asis', eval=!is.null(mv$mcmc_diagnostics$ess)}
hp <- mv$mcmc_diagnostics$hmc_plots
if (!is.null(hp$change_ess) && isTRUE(hp$use_files)) {
  cat('<img src="', hp$change_ess,
      '" style="max-width:100%;height:auto;',
      'display:block;margin:0 auto;" />\n', sep = "")
} else if (!is.null(hp$change_ess)) {
  print(hp$change_ess +
    ggplot2::labs(
      title   = paste0("ESS vs. draw count  (par: ",
                       hp$par_name, ")"),
      caption = "Dashed line = 400 draws threshold"))
}
```

### Local ESS

```{r mcmc_local_ess, results='asis', eval=!is.null(mv$mcmc_diagnostics$hmc_plots$local_ess)}
hp <- mv$mcmc_diagnostics$hmc_plots
if (isTRUE(hp$use_files)) {
  cat('<img src="', hp$local_ess,
      '" style="max-width:100%;height:auto;',
      'display:block;margin:0 auto;" />\n', sep = "")
} else {
  print(hp$local_ess +
    ggplot2::labs(
      title   = paste0("Local ESS  (par: ", hp$par_name, ")"),
      caption = paste0("Red rug = divergent transitions; ",
                       "orange = max tree-depth")))
}
```

### Quantile ESS

```{r mcmc_quantile_ess, results='asis', eval=!is.null(mv$mcmc_diagnostics$hmc_plots$quantile_ess)}
hp <- mv$mcmc_diagnostics$hmc_plots
if (isTRUE(hp$use_files)) {
  cat('<img src="', hp$quantile_ess,
      '" style="max-width:100%;height:auto;',
      'display:block;margin:0 auto;" />\n', sep = "")
} else {
  print(hp$quantile_ess +
    ggplot2::labs(
      title   = paste0("Quantile ESS  (par: ", hp$par_name, ")"),
      caption = paste0("Red rug = divergent transitions; ",
                       "orange = max tree-depth")))
}
```

### Rank Plots

```{r mcmc_rank_plots, results='asis', eval=!is.null(mv$mcmc_diagnostics$hmc_plots$rank_plots)}
hp <- mv$mcmc_diagnostics$hmc_plots
if (isTRUE(hp$use_files)) {
  cat('<img src="', hp$rank_plots,
      '" style="max-width:100%;height:auto;',
      'display:block;margin:0 auto;" />\n', sep = "")
} else {
  print(hp$rank_plots +
    ggplot2::labs(
      title = paste0("Rank histogram  (par: ", hp$par_name, ")")))
}
```

### Pairs (First Params)

```{r mcmc_pairs1, results='asis', eval=!is.null(mv$mcmc_diagnostics$hmc_plots$pairs1_src)}
hp <- mv$mcmc_diagnostics$hmc_plots
cat('<img src="', hp$pairs1_src,
    '" style="max-width:100%;height:auto;display:block;margin:0 auto;" />\n',
    sep = "")
```
